title: Welcome
body: Posts live in the repository’s posts/ folder (one JSON file each), with posts/manifest.json listing them. You can keep this drafts/posts.txt as your source copy: edit here, then run the sync step above to update the site.
zhBody: 文章保存在仓库的 posts/ 目录下（每篇一个 JSON），由 posts/manifest.json 索引。你也可以把本文件 drafts/posts.txt 当作草稿源：在这里修改后，按上面步骤同步到网站。
